input.background: Calculate the standard deviations of the batches of numbers provided in different units (years, months, days). Compare the variability of the batches.
input.question: Calculate the standard deviation for Batch A (0 years, 1 year, 2 years).

output.answer: The standard deviation for Batch A is $s_1=1$ year.

meta_info.caption: Units of measure changes numeric values of a standard deviation.
